name: heramb
description: The key to effortless deployment across any platform

scripts.build: npm run build -w @heramb/core && npm run build -w @heramb/provider-railway -w @heramb/provider-vercel -w @heramb/provider-upstash && npm run build -w @heramb/cli && npm run build -w @heramb/api && npm run build -w @heramb/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
